name: French Silk Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Frozen whipped topping - thawed (1 3/4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
Place the chocolate in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cook until the chocolate melts. Let the chocolate cool. Cream the butter; gradually add sugar, beating at medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Stir in the chocolate. Add eggs one at a time, beating for 5 minutes after each addition. Fold in the whipped topping, and spoon the mixture into the pastry shell. Chill for 2 hours. Beat the whipping cream until foamy; gradually add powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form. Spread the whipped cream on top of the pie, and garnish with shaved chocolate if desired. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
